message:
fix: prevent card action buttons from being clipped after resize (#3501) (#3523)

When a card is resized to a narrower width, the header's left side (title,
badges) did not shrink, pushing the right-side action buttons (expand, bug
report, kebab menu) outside the card's overflow-hidden boundary.

Fix:
- Add min-w-0 to the left header div so flex children can shrink below
  their content width
- Add truncate to the title h3 so long titles ellipsize instead of
  overflowing
- Add flex-shrink-0 to the right header div (action buttons) so they
  are never compressed
- Add flex-shrink-0 to badge spans and the card icon to keep them crisp

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
